sections.name: Oratio
lines: Grant, we beseech You, O almighty God, that we who celebrate the anniversary of the death of blessed Prisca, Your Virgin and Martyr, may rejoice on her yearly feast-day and benefit by the example of such great faith.

sections.name: Secreta
lines: We beseech You, O Lord, that this sacrificial gift which we offer in commemorating the death of Your saints, may loose the bonds of our sins and bestow upon us the gifts of Your mercy.

sections.name: Postcommunio
lines: Filled with the sacrament of salvation, we beseech You, O Lord, to help us by the prayers of her whose feast we are celebrating.
